name: playwright-openai-plugin
description: Installable Codex plugin and local Playwright CLIs for logged-in OpenAI/ChatGPT, CSDN, X Articles, and Xiaohongshu browser workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Control logged-in ChatGPT, CSDN, X Articles, and Xiaohongshu browser workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Installable Codex plugin for local Playwright browser automation. It helps Codex inspect, submit, wait, collect, revise, and diagnose ChatGPT web workflows through an already logged-in managed browser session without storing browser credentials. It also includes difficulty-aware ChatGPT image routing, a GPT Image prompt-router skill backed by an attributed offline prompt catalogue, CSDN Markdown publishing automation for dry-run validation and draft preparation, X Articles Markdown validation and draft-safe fill, and Xiaohongshu note validation, local media upload, and draft-safe fill.
defaultPrompt: Inspect my current ChatGPT browser session.
Generate an image and collect the result.
Find a GPT Image 2 prompt pattern for an image idea.
Check whether an image job can wait, collect, or revise.
Prepare a CSDN article draft with images, cover, tags, category, article type, source URL, and visibility.
Prepare an X Article draft from Markdown and stop before final publication.
Prepare a Xiaohongshu note draft with local media and stop before final publication.
